SEARCH
Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.api.user

Interface UserDeletionReason

All Known Implementing Classes:
UserDeletionReason.UserDeletionReasonImpl
public interface UserDeletionReason
Represents a reasoning why a user instance got deleted. This can have lots of causes, but may be done due to data protection regulations.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type

    Description
    static final record 
    UserDeletionReason.UserDeletionReasonImpl
     

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final UserDeletionReason
    USER_DELETED
    The user was deleted by the system or a team member.
    static final UserDeletionReason
    USER_REQUESTED
    The user requested the deletion of their account, possibly due to privacy concerns and/or data protection regulations.

    reason()
